name: Ovulation Cycle & Fertility Window Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to estimate ovulation date, fertile window, and cycle variability based on menstrual cycle data. Applies statistical process control (SPC) and lean principles to cycle tracking.

inputs.label: Average cycle length (days)
inputs.businessContext: Typical range for healthy adult women; used as baseline for ovulation estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical range for healthy adult women; used as baseline for ovulation estimation.

inputs.label: Luteal phase length (days)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed post-ovulation phase; variation indicates potential luteal phase defect.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed post-ovulation phase; variation indicates potential luteal phase defect.

inputs.label: Start date of last menstrual period
inputs.businessContext: Reference point for calculating next ovulation and fertile window.

label_i18n.en: Start date of last menstrual period

businessContext_i18n.en: Reference point for calculating next ovulation and fertile window.

inputs.label: Cycle length variability (standard deviation, days)
inputs.businessContext: Used to compute confidence intervals and adjust fertile window width per SPC rules.

businessContext_i18n.en: Used to compute confidence intervals and adjust fertile window width per SPC rules.

inputs.label: Age group
inputs.businessContext: Age affects cycle regularity and fertility; used for risk adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age affects cycle regularity and fertility; used for risk adjustment.

inputs.label: Irregular cycles (variation > 7 days)
inputs.businessContext: Triggers alternative calculation method and alerts for medical consultation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Triggers alternative calculation method and alerts for medical consultation.

rules.message: Cycle length must be between 20 and 45 days.
Luteal phase length must be between 10 and 16 days.
High variability detected; consider setting 'Irregular cycles' to true.
Short luteal phase in age >40 may indicate diminished ovarian reserve.

thresholds.message: Fertile window extends beyond cycle boundaries; check inputs.
High cycle variability reduces ovulation prediction confidence; consider additional tracking methods.
Luteal phase < 11 days may indicate luteal phase defect; consult healthcare provider.

formulas.name: Estimated Ovulation Date
formulas.description: Calculates the day of ovulation relative to cycle start (day 1 = first day of period).

formulas.name: Fertile Window Start
formulas.description: Start of the 5-day fertile window (sperm survival up to 5 days).

formulas.name: Fertile Window End
formulas.description: End of fertile window (ovulation day + 1 for egg viability).

formulas.name: Cycle Confidence Interval (95%)
formulas.description: Uses cycle variability to compute a 95% confidence interval around the estimated ovulation date (assuming normal distribution).

formulas.name: Adjusted Fertile Window Start (with confidence)
formulas.description: Extends the fertile window start by the confidence interval to account for variability.

formulas.name: Adjusted Fertile Window End (with confidence)
formulas.description: Extends the fertile window end by the confidence interval.

formulas.name: Data Confidence Score
formulas.description: Composite score (0-100) based on variability and irregularity flags, using a lean sigma approach.

primary.label: Predicted Ovulation Date (absolute day of cycle)

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Cycle variability > 5 days
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Reduces prediction accuracy; equivalent to process sigma shift of 1.5.
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Decreases confidence score by up to 50 points.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Irregular cycles flag active
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Indicates potential anovulation or hormonal imbalance; standard formulas may be invalid.
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Triggers alternative calculation and reduces confidence by 30 points.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Age > 40 with short luteal phase
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Combined risk factor for diminished ovarian reserve.
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Reduces fertile window by 1 day and confidence by 20 points.

suggestedActions.label: Track basal body temperature (BBT)
suggestedActions.description: Improves ovulation detection accuracy; recommended for cycles with variability > 3 days.

suggestedActions.label: Use ovulation predictor kits (OPK)
suggestedActions.description: Provides real-time LH surge detection; especially useful when confidence score < 70.

suggestedActions.label: Consult healthcare provider
suggestedActions.description: Recommended if luteal phase < 11 days or cycle variability > 7 days.

suggestedActions.label: Maintain detailed cycle log for 3+ months
suggestedActions.description: Improves data confidence and allows trend analysis per SPC principles.
